metadata.description: FastAPI: Modern asynchronous web framework. Automatic OpenAPI documentation. Pydantic validation. Type annotation-driven. Python code example for type annotation and Pydantic validation: ```python from pydantic import BaseModel, Field class Item(BaseModel): name: str = Field(..., title="The name of the item", description="A brief description of the item") price: float = Field(..., gt=0, title="The price of the item") # Example usage: item_data = {"name": "Apple", "price": 1.2} item = Item(**item_data) print(item.name) # Output: Apple ``` This example demonstrates a simple Pydantic model with type annotations and validation constraints.

data_pointers.title: FastAPI
data_pointers.content_preview: FastAPI: Modern asynchronous web framework. Automatic OpenAPI documentation. Pydantic validation. Type annotation-driven. Python code example for type annotation and Pydantic validation: ```python from pydantic import BaseModel, Field class Item(BaseModel): name: str = Field(..., title="The name of the item", description="A brief description of the item") price: float = Field(..., gt=0, title="The price of the item") # Example usage: item_data = {"name": "Apple", "price": 1.2} item = Item(**item_data) print(item.name) # Output: Apple ``` This example demonstrates a simple Pydantic model with type annotations and validation constraints.

common_pitfalls: 在同步视图函数中执行阻塞 I/O 操作（如 time.sleep 或 requests.get）而未使用异步，导致服务器响应变慢。应使用 async def 或在线程池中运行。
忽略 Pydantic 模型验证，直接使用 dict 作为请求体，导致类型错误或安全漏洞。应始终定义 Pydantic 模型。
未正确配置 CORS 中间件，导致前端跨域请求被拒绝。需添加 CORSMiddleware 并设置 allow_origins。
